text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from our outing, Winning Ticket
and I stop at a bookstore in town.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whoaaaa! This is... No waaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be totally absorbed in a novel she
picked up. Later on...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HEEEEY! Taishiiiin! Hayahideeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back at the academy, she runs at full pelt over to
her two friends, Narita Taishin and Biwa
Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The three of us are inseparable! We were born in
different places, but from now on, we're brothers!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Brothers?! What're you going on about?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Ticket, tell me. Have you perhaps recently
read "Romance of the Three Kingdoms"?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's totally right! I read it at a bookstore just now, and it was so moving!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanna be your brother-in-arms! Who
would you wanna play? Which character?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whyyyy?! Come on, if you don't do it, I'll
have to find someone else!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Pleeease, I really wanna be your brother, Taishin!
It wouldn't be the same with anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I said I don't want to. It's so childish.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I get how you feel, but you know Ticket is never
going to give up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Besides, with her enthusiasm, she might rope in
the entire academy into playing a "Romance of
the Three Kingdoms" game.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That sounds terrifying... Fine, I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good. Now, shall we get this over with?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The Oath of the Peach Garden... If I were to
choose one out of the three warriors in this scene,
I'd be...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Guan Yu. I swear on my Green Dragon Crescent
Blade and, er, beard to fight for salvation!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How's that? I suppose I'm the wise general. You're
up next.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay... Uh... I don't wanna be a musclebrain
like Zhang Fei, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey. I'm Liu Bei, and as the oldest, I'll set the
world straight. Or something like that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, next. Finish the oath.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My name is Tickezo! Thank you for joining me,
brothers!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo's not part of the story! Didn't you say you
loved the book? You forgot your character
already!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: There wasn't a Tickezo? Aww... In that case...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My name is Ticketarooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nuts. "Ticketaro" doesn't even sound
Chinese. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but I'm glad she at least read a historical
novel. We can learn a lot from the past.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it seems you're somewhat knowledgeable
too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There are so many historical novels. Which one
do you think would be most useful for Winning
Ticket to experience?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, The Three Musketeers —the famous French tale. A story from a country that loves racing would certainly be useful.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm... Oh, I've heard of that one.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! Then let's do that too!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Only for a little while. Now let's see...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My name is Athos. I will lead you to honorable
victory!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm Aramis. I focus on being flashy for the ladies,
but well, who cares.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My name is TICKEZOOO! I'm all for you, my
brothers!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Stop that! Pick either Porthos or D'Artagnan, and
stop inserting yourself!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! My name is D'a... D'al... DALMATIAN!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's a dog... But at least you're on the right
track.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, it would be a poor lesson if we stopped at
introductions alone—we should delve a little
further into French culture. There's ballroom
dancing, or...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ballroom dancing?! All riiight, that's it! Let's get
dancing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come on, you two! Dance like nobody's watching!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I suppose dancing would be more productive than playing a character.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, yeah. I'm stuck on wherever this ride
goes, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them practice dancing until they're
drenched in sweat.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wooow, so this is the world of The Three Musketeers! It's so incredible!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure the musketeers did any dancing.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Did you see, Trainer? Isn't this neat?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
New, heart-touching experiences can help me
grow! They'll make me stronger!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The excitement of races is great, but let's look for
even more cool and exciting things!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, let's gooo! YEAH! I'M DALMATIAN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the dalmatian—I mean, Winning
Ticket—starts looking for all kinds of emotionally
touching moments.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ahh, the Sengoku period... It is important to study the history of one's own country.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sengoku! I know a little about that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of... Taishin, wasn't there someone
important in history with your name?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I dunno, was there a warlord called Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let me remember. His name was...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taika no Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaaa! Isn't that cool? You share a name with
someone super famous!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's not a person! You're thinking of Taika no Kaishin. I'm not a reformation period!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I think there was a Hayahide too. Uh, what was he
called... Kobayakawa Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaah! I put my trust in you, Hayahideee!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wrong—that's Kobayakawa Hideaki. And don't
trust him. He's got red flags of betrayal all over
his history.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! The battle is about to begin! Everyone,
to waaaarrr!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She certainly keeps us busy. But I guess running around is more effective than fooling around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, if we're gonna run, I don't mind so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them wildly dash around like the
warlords of old.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This... this is truly the Sengoku period! Waaaah!
I'm really feeling it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, we didn't go to war or anything. It was just
training like usual.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Did you see, Trainer? Isn't this neat?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
New, heart-touching experiences can help me
grow! They'll make me stronger!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The excitement of races is great, but let's look for
even more cool and exciting things!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! Let's go! I will unite this land into a
wondrous country! To Honno-ji Temple!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how it worked out, but she's in high
spirits. That's how Winning Ticket starts looking
for all kinds of emotionally touching moments.
